---
title: "Teaching"
---

For more than 20 years I taught and researched in the social sciences, mainly at the [Faculty of Economics of the University of Porto](https://sigarra.up.pt/up/en/WEB_BASE.GERA_PAGINA?p_pagina=home), as well as at other university schools.

### Areas Taught

- Social sciences research methods
- Statistics
- Organizational behavior

### Academic Qualification

- **Provas de Aptidão Pedagógica e Capacidade Científica** (2008)
  Faculdade de Economia do Porto
